description: Implementation plan review consolidation: write-implementation-plan command invokes the orchestrator with architect + tech-lead + design-system-agent as native reviewers. Findings include a critical sequencing gap (task dependency cycle), a medium-severity milestone scope issue, and a low-severity documentation finding. Tests plan-review command path and cross-team finding attribution.

raw_findings.title: Circular dependency between Task 3.2 and Task 3.4
raw_findings.description: Task 3.2 (Implement payment gateway) lists Task 3.4 (Configure webhook handler) as a prerequisite. Task 3.4 lists Task 3.2 as a prerequisite. This circular dependency makes both tasks unschedulable and will block the milestone.

raw_findings.title: Task dependency cycle in Milestone 3 blocks parallel execution
raw_findings.description: The dependency graph for Milestone 3 contains a cycle: Task 3.2 ↔ Task 3.4. Both claim the other as a prerequisite. The plan cannot be executed as written until this is resolved.

raw_findings.title: Milestone 2 contains 8 tasks exceeding the concurrent_tasks limit of 3
raw_findings.description: Milestone 2 lists 8 tasks, but the project config sets concurrent_tasks: 3. A milestone with 8 tasks and 3-task parallelism requires at least 3 scheduling rounds. The plan should split Milestone 2 into two milestones to reflect realistic delivery sequencing.

raw_findings.title: Plan references checkout session storage without an ADR
raw_findings.description: The plan describes a session-storage approach for checkout state but does not reference or link an ADR. Architecture decisions of this scope should be documented in docs/specs/decisions/ per project conventions.

findings.description: Task 3.2 (Implement payment gateway) lists Task 3.4 (Configure webhook handler) as a prerequisite. Task 3.4 lists Task 3.2 as a prerequisite. This circular dependency makes both tasks unschedulable and will block the milestone.

findings.description: Milestone 2 lists 8 tasks, but the project config sets concurrent_tasks: 3. A milestone with 8 tasks and 3-task parallelism requires at least 3 scheduling rounds. The plan should split Milestone 2 into two milestones to reflect realistic delivery sequencing.

findings._note: already at low (floor); no further demotion possible

consolidated_output.path_and_reason_header: Review path: multi-model (above-threshold diff; reviewers: 3 native + 1 external)

expected_judgement_notes: Consolidation is correct: (1) circular-dependency finding merged from architect + codex; severity unanimous critical; raised_by[] cross-team attribution correct; (2) milestone2-overloaded: single tech-lead reviewer, minority-of-one demoted medium→low; (3) missing-adr: already at low floor, not demoted further; (4) path_and_reason_header correctly shows 3 native + 1 external for write-implementation-plan command.
